positive: A highly stylized, minimalist vector illustration of a cosmic creature, resembling a bioluminescent jellyfish or manta ray, gliding through abstract nebulae and crystalline space dust. The creature features elegant, sweeping tentacles and a glowing central core, outlined in crisp white and vibrant cyan. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette: deep indigo, cosmic violet, electric cyan, and stark white. The composition must be centered, with the creature dominating the foreground. The overall style should be modern graphic design, suitable for a clean apparel print, with strong silhouettes and geometric, symmetrical elements. Flat colors with dramatic gradients, suitable for single-color screen printing.
